info.name: Expense Tracking System - Full API
info.description:
Comprehensive API collection for the Expense Tracking System covering all microservices.

Gateway: http://localhost:8080

Auto-login: Set 'email' and 'password' variables, then any request will auto-authenticate if jwt is empty.

exec: raw: JSON.stringify({ email: email, password: password })
console.log('Got 401 - clearing JWT to trigger re-auth on next request');
